ads.title: Boat Airdopes 300, Cinematic Spatial Audio, 50HRS Battery, 4Mic AI ENx, Fast Charge, App Support, Low Latency, IPX4, v5.3 Bluetooth Earbuds, TWS Ear Buds Wireless Earphones with mic (Gunmetal Black)
Boat Nirvana Ion, 120HRS Battery, Crystal Bionic Sound w/Dual EQ Modes, 4Mics ENx, App Support, Low Latency, IPX4, v.5.2 Bluetooth Earbuds, TWS Ear Buds Wireless Earphones with mic (Charcoal Black)

Boat Airdopes Plus 311, Glass Design, ENx Tech, Fast Charge, 50 Hrs Battery, Stream Ad Free Music via App Support Bluetooth Earbuds, TWS Ear Buds Wireless Earphones with mic (Crimson Red)
Noise Buds N1 Truly Wireless Earbuds with Chrome Finish, 40H of Playtime, Quad Mic with ENC, Ultra Low Latency Gaming (Up to 40 Ms), Instacharge(10 Min=120 Min), Bluetooth V5.3(Ice Blue)

content.bullet_points:
Quad Mics with ENx Technology: ENx-powered quad mics in these earbuds eliminate noise for clear calls regardless of your location. Converse in cafés and on public transport hands-free with your Airdopes.
Powerful 13mm Drivers: Tune into thumping bass-rich boAt Signature Sound from the dual 13 mm drivers. Experience every beat to the fullest!
Up to 40 hours of Playback: Groove uninterrupted with the boAt Airdopes 219 TWS Earbuds. Listen to songs and podcasts while unwinding for up to 40 hours.
BEAST Mode: Immerse in the virtual world with the 45 ms low-latency gaming BEAST mode. Enjoy lag-free gaming while playing solo or with your squad.
ASAP Charge: Charge your buds for 10 minutes and keep binge-watching for 120 minutes. Thanks to ASAP Charge, you can resume your favorite web series and tick it off your watchlist.
IPX4 Water Resistance: No matter where you are, keep enjoying audio content as your Airdopes feature IPX4 resistance to prevent sweat and water splashes from damaging them.
Bluetooth v5.4: Advanced Bluetooth v5.4 in Airdopes 219 makes it easy to just pop in your buds at home or on the go without the hassle of tangled wires.

buy_it_with.title: Boat Airdopes 300, Cinematic Spatial Audio, 50HRS Battery, 4Mic AI ENx, Fast Charge, App Support, Low Latency, IPX4, v5.3 Bluetooth Earbuds, TWS Ear Buds Wireless Earphones with mic (Gunmetal Black)

content.description: Relax to your playlist tunes with the boAt Airdopes 219 TWS Earbuds. With 40 hours of playtime, these earbuds ensure uninterrupted audio entertainment. So, you can game and stream without frequent charging hassles. In addition, four ENx™-enabled powerful mics enable you to answer calls on the go without disruptive background noise. Catch up on your watchlist with the bass-heavy boAt Signature Sound from the 13 mm drivers and experience enthralling audio. In case of low battery, ASAP™ Charge the earbuds to get 120 minutes of performance after 10 minutes of charging. As soon as you flip open the case lid, your Airdopes get connected with IWP™ technology. Moreover, you can hustle effortlessly with voice assistant activation using your Airdopes. Make calls, check the local weather updates, etc., with voice commands. Also, the 45 ms low latency of BEAST™ mode eliminates lag for a realistic feel while playing games. Airdopes 219 sports an IPX4-resistant design, ensuring sweat and splashes won't get in the way of your grooving!

content.product_name: Boat Airdopes 219, 4Mics ENx, 40H Battery, Best in Segment for Calling, Stream Ad Free Music via App Support, Bluetooth Earbuds, TWS Ear Buds Wireless Earphones with mic (Forest Sage)

reviews.author: Priya
reviews.content: I’m really impressed with these earbuds. The sound quality is excellent, with clear audio and good bass. Calling performance is also very good—the voice is clear on both sides. The battery life is strong and lasts long enough for daily use. Overall, a great product and definitely worth it!”
reviews.title: Excellent Sound, Clear Calls & Long Battery!”

reviews.author: Dev Bhardwaj
reviews.content: One of the best in the range and I am saying this with confidence because I have many tws with me of this range these have good and loud sound with no distorsion on high volume the only con can be the low battery backup but they do support fast charging. Also the build quality is amazing like I have dropped these so many times and they are still holding great.
reviews.title: Good product with great build just a bit low on battery side.

reviews.author: Pari
reviews.content: Its very nice and has a good battery back up and great sound quality
reviews.title: Good quality sound
